metadata.description: Cleaned San Pedro, Laguna barangay layout for Leaflet. Central white gap assigned to San Antonio; Bayan-bayanan labelled above United Better Living; no landmark points/circle polygons included.
notes: Uses the user's original GeoJSON as the base.
Follows the supplied San Pedro barangay map layout where the original GeoJSON was missing or mislabeled.
Contains polygon features only; landmarks are in a separate optional GeoJSON.

properties.name: San Lorenzo Ruiz
properties.geometry_note: Layout-traced approximation from the supplied barangay reference map; replace with official LGU/NAMRIA geometry if available.

properties.name: Bayan-bayanan
properties.note: Sub-area label shown on the supplied San Pedro map; kept separate so the area above United Better Living is not mislabeled.

properties.name: Maharlika
properties.geometry_note: Layout-traced approximation from the supplied barangay reference map; replace with official LGU/NAMRIA geometry if available.

properties.name: San Antonio
properties.fix_note: Central gap between United Better Living, Calendola, Sampaguita, and San Vicente was joined to San Antonio per user instruction.
